sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE);
SELECT id, amount, ntile(2) OVER (ORDER BY amount) AS bucket FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE ntile(2) OVER (ORDER BY amount) = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*), ntile(3) OVER (PARTITION BY CASE WHEN amount >= 200 THEN 'high' ELSE 'low' END ORDER BY amount) AS bucket FROM sales GROUP BY bucket;
